description: Git safety, secret protection, and TDD compliance gates

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -qE 'git\s+add\s+(-A|--all|\.)(\s|$)' && echo 'BLOCKED: Use explicit file staging (git add <file>) instead of git add . / -A / --all' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0
jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -qE '\b--no-verify\b' && echo 'BLOCKED: --no-verify is forbidden. Fix the pre-commit errors instead.' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0
jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -qE '\b--dangerously-skip-permissions\b' && echo 'BLOCKED: --dangerously-skip-permissions is forbidden.' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE '\.env(\.[a-zA-Z0-9]+)*$' && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE '\.env\.example$' && echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot modify .env files (except .env.example). Edit secrets manually.' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0

echo 'Dev standards re-injected after compaction: (1) TDD — All business logic must have test files, follow Red-Green-Refactor. (2) GIT — Never use git add . / -A / --all, stage explicitly, never use --no-verify. (3) SECRETS — Never modify .env files except .env.example, never commit secrets. (4) COMMITS — Use conventional commits.'
